roa.docketEntryComment: Supplemental Declaration in support of SFPD's opposition to Deft return of property motion
SFPD'S MOTION TO CONTINUE DEFT'S RETURN OF PROPERTY MOTION FILED
SFPD OPP TO DEFT MTN TO RETURN PROPERTY - FILED
DEFT'S MOTION RETURN PROPERTY FILED AT INSISTENCE
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON BEHALFOF THE SFPD/CTORD:THE MOTION TO RETURN THE SAFE IS DENIED AS IT IS THE PROPERTY OF ANOTHER/
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/DAWT/X: AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON THE BEHALF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/X:THE COURT GRANTS THESFPD MOTION TO CONTINUE/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/DAWT/X: AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON THE BEHALF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/CONTD: DEFENSE MOTIONFOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY/

/CAL: MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/DAWT/X:AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON BEHALFOF THE SF POLICE DEPT,/X:AT THIS TIME THE DEFENSE WITHDRAWS IT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF ONLY THE FOLLOWING PREVIOUSLY REQUESTED ITEMS:/X:BOLT CUTTERS,PAINT ROLLER & KEYS WITH FOB/CTORD:WHEN THE PRESCRIBED TIMELINE FOR CLAIMING LOST OR FOUND PROPERTY (ASTO THE SEALED SAFE) EXPIRES, THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS ORDEREDTO OPEN THE SAFE & EXAMINE THE CONTENTS (IF ANY)/CONT/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FORTHE FOLLOWING REASON:THE PARTIES AGREED TO CONTINUE TO 03-02-21 OFF THE RECORD/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH2:CJ 43D/CTS:43/CC/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/4019HALF/DISM3/RESTR/SA2:THIRSTY BEAR BREWING CO, 661 HOWARD ST, SF CA 94105/SA2:BERGGRUEN ART GALLERY, 10 HAWTHORNE ST, SF CA 94105/SAORD3/SAORD/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURT NO, 20010323 IS ORDERED ASFOLLOWS:/X:PAY RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY APD,/X:ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDER FILED IN 20010323,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:002/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED WITHNO CONTEMPT FINDING/X:DEFENSE REQUEST FOR ACM REFERRAL IS DENIED BY THE COURT/BAIL:50,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON OR BEFORE 10-27-20/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ENTER DIRECTLY INTO HEALTH RIGHT 360 RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/LDPX:11-10-20/TE:1 HOUR/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT & 4011,6 REPORT/DAWT/X:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORTREQUESTED TO BE CONTINUED BY ACM/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/X:4011,6 REPORT RECEIVED BY TE COURT/ /CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DAWF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:11-10-20 (30TH)/987,2/TE:1 HOUR/SAORD/SA2:661 HOWARD ST,,SF/SA2:10 HAWTHORNE ST,,SF/SAORD3//X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-06-20/M09/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 10-06-20/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-23-20/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON BEHALFOF THE SF POLICE DEPT,/NP/CONT/
